# readOnlyPropertyAttribute

**Type Property**

A class property for a read-only property attribute.

## Declaration

```swift
class var readOnlyPropertyAttribute: CMIOExtensionPropertyAttributes<AnyObject> { get }
```

## Discussion

The attribute doesn’t contain values for its [doc://com.apple.coremediaio/documentation/CoreMediaIO/CMIOExtensionPropertyAttributes/minValue], [doc://com.apple.coremediaio/documentation/CoreMediaIO/CMIOExtensionPropertyAttributes/maxValue], or [doc://com.apple.coremediaio/documentation/CoreMediaIO/CMIOExtensionPropertyAttributes/validValues] properties.
title: readOnlyPropertyAttribute
